results.rendered_html: yathā—saṃkhyam ind. acc˚ to number, n˚ for n˚ (so that in two series composed of similar n˚, the several n˚ of one correspond to those of the other, e.g. the first to the first &c.) ( APrāt. ;  VPrāt. ;  KātyŚr.  &c.)

results.rendered_html: yathāsaṃkhyam (ya˚ + saṃkhyā) adv. Zahl für Zahl d. i. in der Weise, dass in zwei Reihen mit Gliedern von gleicher Anzahl die einzelnen Glieder der Reihe nach sich entsprechen,  VS. PRĀT. 1,143 .  AV. PRĀT. 1,99 .  P. 1,3,10 .  KĀTY. ŚR. 1,3,23 . 2,3,5 . 3,3,3 .  YĀJÑ. 1,21 .  SUŚR. 1,135,13 . 169,14 . 311,1 .  AK. 2,9,3 .  VARĀH. BṚH. S. 68,24 . 79,9 . 97,16 . 104,49 . 105,15 .  BHĀG. P. 3,5,36 . 5,1,33 . 16,9 .  PAÑCAR. 2,8,11 .  SĀH. D. 27,10 .
